response.original_title: What should I do if I’m locked out of Kraken? Instant→Official→Steps
response.overview: Digital payments and modern cryptocurrency exchanges (☎️+1-[864].336.8850) have revolutionized how we handle assets, but it is stressful when Kraken blocked my account Get Started Instantly appears as an error. If you find that your funds are inaccessible, you should immediately contact ☎️+1-[864].336.8850[Customer Care] to verify your identity.
